chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.445 of 2023 Sadruddin Suteria (since deceased) through his legal heirs Tufail S. Suteria and others v. Sherali Alibhoy Suteria (since deceased) through his legal heirs Ebrahim Sherali Suteria and others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.5693/2024. 25.4.2024 Mr. Muhammad Faran Khan, Advocate for Appellants Mr. Sufyan holding brief for Mr. Shayan Ahmed, Advocate for Respondents ************* Learned Counsel for Appellants after a minute perusal of the order dated 01.11.2023 realized that a preliminary decree could only be passed after a probe of admitted property of the deceased. This exercise is yet to be carried out. Hence he does not press this Appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with all pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
